name: PM-KISAN
description: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi provides income support to farmer families.
benefit: ₹6,000/year direct benefit transfer in 3 equal installments
eligibility: Small and marginal farmers with landholding up to 2 hectares
howToApply: Visit nearest CSC or apply online at pmkisan.gov.in

name: PM Fasal Bima Yojana
description: Provides crop insurance to farmers against natural calamities, pests and diseases.
benefit: Insurance at 1.5-2% premium for Rabi, 2% for Kharif crops
eligibility: All farmers growing notified crops in notified areas
howToApply: Apply through banks, insurance companies, or CSC centers

name: Jal Jeevan Mission
description: Aims to provide safe drinking water through household tap connections to all rural households.
benefit: Functional household tap connection with potable water
eligibility: All rural households without piped water supply
howToApply: Contact Gram Panchayat or district water supply department

name: PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana
description: Scheme to install rooftop solar panels and provide free electricity to households.
benefit: Up to 300 units free electricity/month + subsidy up to ₹78,000
ministry: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy

name: MGNREGS
description: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Scheme provides guaranteed wage employment.
benefit: 100 days guaranteed wage employment per year
eligibility: Adult members of rural households willing to do unskilled manual work
howToApply: Register at Gram Panchayat and get Job Card

name: PM Ujjwala Yojana
description: Provides free LPG connections to women from BPL households.
eligibility: BPL household women above 18 years without LPG connection
howToApply: Visit nearest LPG distributor with required documents
ministry: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas

name: Soil Health Card Scheme
description: Provides farmers with soil health card containing crop-wise recommendations of nutrients and fertilizers.
benefit: Free soil testing with nutrient recommendations
howToApply: Contact local Agriculture Department or Krishi Vigyan Kendra

name: Atal Bhujal Yojana
description: Aims at sustainable management of groundwater resources with community participation.
benefit: Groundwater management support and infrastructure development
